retained_signals.comment: Weak but directionally coherent positive edge; keep in candidate pool, but do not treat as promotable strategy.

why: Only one of the four tested atomic signals shows positive edge.
A new mixed family built now would likely just reintroduce rejected signals and increase research freedom too early.
Another positive atomic signal should be found before opening the next family-construction round.

do_not_do_next: Do not open a new mixed price-volume family immediately.
Do not remix momentum_60_5 with reversal_5d, volatility_20d, or liquidity_20d as currently defined.
Do not try to rescue rejected signals with extraction or turnover tweaks before they show positive edge on their own.
